# MDE v1.3.3

## Features

- Adds current-file Markdown search with Cmd/Ctrl+F, an editor action-bar search button, match counts, Enter-to-cycle navigation, and separate active-match highlighting.
- Adds workspace-wide Markdown search with Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+F and a compact Spotlight-style dialog from the explorer toolbar.
- Opens workspace search results directly in the matched file while preserving the query in the editor search UI so the result remains highlighted.
- Updates window titles for opened workspace files to show `{file-name} - {workspace-path}` instead of only the workspace path.

## Bug Fixes

- Keeps the global search input focused when opened from the keyboard shortcut for reliable keyboard-only searching.
- Preserves native button semantics for workspace search results so assistive technology and tests can target result actions correctly.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Adds shared text-search utilities used by renderer highlighting and main-process workspace search.
- Adds bounded, workspace-scoped search IPC with stale-workspace validation and path-safety checks.
- Adds unit coverage for current-file search helpers, editor highlight publication, workspace search service behavior, app-shell search actions, and explorer toolbar accessibility.
- Adds integration coverage for workspace search IPC success and stale-workspace rejection.
- Adds E2E coverage for current-file search, workspace search, result opening, and retained editor highlighting.
- GitHub repository secrets for paid Apple signing/notarization are not configured in this environment; this release keeps the existing unsigned macOS artifact path.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS unsigned DMG and ZIP artifacts for Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.
- Windows NSIS installer artifacts.
